<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Validate npm Release Input<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Validate explicit npm release versions and release-type values.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                    | Description                                                  | Required | Default                    |
|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|----------|----------------------------|
| `version`               | Optional explicit x.y.z version.                             | `false`  | ` `                        |
| `release-type`          | SemVer release type used when version is empty.              | `false`  | `patch`                    |
| `version-pattern`       | Bash regex for explicit version validation.                  | `false`  | `^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$` |
| `allowed-release-types` | Space-separated release types allowed when version is empty. | `false`  | `patch minor major`        |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/validate-npm-release-input" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Validate workflow_dispatch release input"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/validate-npm-release-input@main"
   with:
    release-type: "${{ inputs.release_type || 'patch' }}"
    version: "${{ inputs.version || '' }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
